dimensions.label: Faithfulness
dimensions.question: How faithful is each summary to what is actually presented in the video chapter?

dimensions.label: Completeness
dimensions.question: How completely does each summary capture the main concepts of the video chapter?

dimensions.label: Coherence
dimensions.question: How coherent and logically organized is each summary?

dimensions.label: Usefulness
dimensions.question: How useful is each summary as educational review material?

familiarity_question: How familiar are you with the topic covered in this video segment?

selection_quality.label: Selection Quality
selection_quality.question: The top row in the picture consists of visual objects selected for the visual summary. Rate the overall quality of the visual summary of this video chapter.

include_important.label: Include Important
include_important.question: The bottom row in the picture consists of visual objects NOT selected for the visual summary. Identify any unselected visual objects which, in your opinion, should be part of a good visual summary. Select below:

exclude_unimportant.label: Exclude Unimportant
exclude_unimportant.question: Among the visual objects selected for the visual summary in the top row, identify any that, in your opinion, should not be part of the visual summary. Deselect below:
